name: Syrupy Sweet Kiss
outcome: [AttackerName] chuckles sweetly as her tongue coils around [TargetName]'s, her sugary sweet saliva invades [TargetHisOrHer] mouth, and [TargetHeOrShe] can't help but gulp it down as [AttackerName]'s lips passionately dominates [TargetHimOrHer] into a dazed stupor.
miss: [AttackerName] chuckles sweetly as her tongue coils around [TargetName]'s, but [TargetHeOrShe] manage to break the kiss long enough to disrupt the spell.
statusOutcome: [TargetName]'s body throbs with warmth as [AttackerName]'s magically enhanced, aphrodisiac laden saliva starts to take its toll...
